rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving root identifiers or deleting invalid clauses
Resolve 'Couldn't resolve reference' errors by using only visible identifiers from the current scope
Address 'assumed type ... is ... but the actual type is ...' by aligning helper declaration types with expressions
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when needed
generic_rules: Validate AGREE expressions against visible AADL identifiers and types
Ensure type consistency in AGREE constant and equation declarations
Avoid introducing package-qualified references not present in the model
Use only declared helpers or visible features in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid annex scopes (type vs implementation)
Helper functions and constants must match declared types
Property associations should reference valid model elements
Guarantees in component types should not reference implementation-specific paths
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix unresolved references
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Do not assume missing identifiers are valid features or types
Do not mix type-level and implementation-level references in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
Requirement Analyst Agent's role in traceability
